title: Heartbeat
description: Adds an Update Button inside of Mod Menu
body:
[![Support on Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/1TheCrazy)

# Heartbeat  
**Simple and safe Modrinth mod updates via Mod Menu.**

## Why?  
Keeping mods up to date shouldn’t be risky or time-consuming. **Heartbeat** integrates directly into **Mod Menu**, allowing you to update your Modrinth-hosted mods manually with a single click—giving you full control while avoiding broken worlds or surprise updates.

Perfect for players who want **Mod Menu updates**, version safety, and a clean workflow.

## Features  
- 🧩 **Mod Menu Integration** – Update mods directly from the Mod Menu UI  
- 🔄 **One-Click Modrinth Updates** – No browser, no manual file handling  
- ⚙️ **Version Compatibility Checks** – Only shows updates compatible with your Minecraft version and mod loader  
- 🔔 **Optional Notifications** – See when updates are available or applied  
- 🛡️ **Safe by Design** – No background or automatic updates; you decide when to update  

## What Changed in v2  
- ❌ Removed automatic background updates  
- ✅ Updates are now **fully manual via Mod Menu**  
- ✅ Improved transparency and user control  
- ✅ Better alignment with Mod Menu–based mod management workflows  

## About  
- 📂 [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/1TheCrazy/HeartbeatMC)  
- 📝 Open source and community-driven  
- 💻 Developed on Windows, expected to work across other operating systems as well  
- 🧠 Designed for Modrinth users who prefer **manual Mod Menu updates**  

## Questions & Bugs  
Found an issue or have a suggestion? Please open an [issue on GitHub](https://github.com/1TheCrazy/HeartbeatMC/issues).  
Bug reports, feature requests, and feedback are always welcome and help improve *Heartbeat* for everyone.
